title: Fragrant Kenyan Vegetable Tagine
description: A resinous and velvety Kenyan dish featuring scotch bonnet peppers, rendered fat, and a variety of vegetables, all cooked to perfection in a scallop shell vessel.
instructions: Heat the rendered fat in a large scallop shell vessel over medium heat.
Add the diced onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped zucchini, scotch bonnet peppers, tomato paste, and vegetable broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the fragrant Kenyan vegetable tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
